  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Refund ---------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Refunding Rs.500.00 against order #260213-002 (total: Rs.1825.60)                                |
  | Customer: Ahmed Khan | Reason: Customer complaint                                                |

  |   -> Creates refund record linked to order                                                       |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_refund_receipt | priority: 0                                           |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders (no change - original order stays completed)                                       |
  |   id: 22da109b... | order_number: 260213-002 | status: completed                                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_refund_receipt | status: pending -> completed                                 |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: 22da109b... | priority: 0                                      |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: refund_receipt | action: create | status: success                                   |
  |   qb_entity_type: RefundReceipt | qb_doc_number: REF-260213-002                                  |
  |   amount_paisa: 50000 | http_status: 200                                                         |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  RefundReceipt  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/refundreceipt] ---------------+
  |   DocNumber: REF-260213-002                                                                      |
  |   TxnDate: 2026-02-13                                                                            |
  |   Customer: Ahmed Khan                                                                           |
  |   TotalAmt: 500.00 PKR                                                                           |

  |         -> Income: "BBQ Station Sales" (default)                                                 |

                           SCENARIO 5: Daily Close  ->  QB JournalEntry + Deposit                        
=========================================================================================================

  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  End of Day Close -----------------------------------------------------------+
  | Date: 2026-02-13 | Closed by: Admin                                                              |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | Channel               Orders        Revenue          Tax          Total                          |
  | -------------------- ------- -------------- ------------ --------------                          |

  | Takeaway                   1     Rs.1660.00    Rs.265.60     Rs.1825.60                          |
  | Call Center                1     Rs.1950.00    Rs.312.00     Rs.2262.00                          |

  |                                                                                                  |
  | TOTALS                     4     Rs.6590.00   Rs.1054.40     Rs.7544.40                          |

  |                                                                                                  |

  |   Cash                               Rs.1763.20                                                  |

  |   Foodpanda                          Rs.1693.60                                                  |

                                                    |

  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

  |   [2] job_type: create_deposit | status: completed | priority: 5                                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log (2 entries)                                                                   |
  |   [1] sync_type: journal_entry | qb_doc_number: DAILY-2026-02-13 | status: success               |
  |   [2] sync_type: deposit | status: success                                                       |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |

=========================================================================================================
                                    TEMPLATE: international_restaurant                                   
                              International Restaurant (Continental/Fusion)                              
=========================================================================================================

  Full-service international restaurant. VAT-based tax. Wine and bar program. Tip income (owner-retained model). Marketplace delivery.

  ACCOUNT MAPPINGS (28 total):
  Type           D Account Name                               QB Account Type                 
  -------------- - ------------------------------------------ --------------------------------
  INCOME         * Food Sales                                 Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Appetizer & Starter Sales                  Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Main Course Sales                          Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Dessert Sales                              Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Bar & Beverage Sales                       Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Wine Sales                                 Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Takeaway Sales                             Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Catering & Events Revenue                  Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Tip Income (Owner Retained)                Income/OtherPrimaryIncome       
  COGS           * Food Cost                                  Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Beverage Cost                              Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Packaging Cost                             Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
  TAX            * VAT Payable                                Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
                   VAT Reduced Rate Payable                   Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  BANK           * Cash Register                              Bank/CashOnHand                 
                   Bank Account (Card Settlements)            Bank/Checking                   
                   Online Payment Settlement                  Bank/Checking                   
                   Marketplace Settlement Receivable          Other Current Asset/OtherCurrentAssets
  EXPENSE          Rider Commission                           Expense/CommissionsAndFees      
  DISCOUNT       * Discount Given                             Income/DiscountsRefundsGiven    
  ROUNDING       * Rounding Adjustment                        Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  CASH O/S       * Cash Over/Short                            Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  TIPS           * Tips Payable                               Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  GIFT CARD      * Gift Card Liability                        Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  LIABILITY      * Customer Deposits                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  SVC CHARGE     * Service Charge Revenue                     Income/ServiceFeeIncome         
  DELIVERY       * Delivery Expense                           Expense/Travel                  
  PLATFORM       * Marketplace Platform Commission            Expense/CommissionsAndFees      

  VALIDATION:
    OK    All 7 required types present with defaults

=========================================================================================================
                          SCENARIO 1: Completed Dine-In Order  ->  QB SalesReceipt                       
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Dine-In --------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-001 | Dine-In | Table: T-05 | Pay: Cash                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Chicken Biryani                    x2    @Rs.450.00     = Rs.900.00                         |
  |   2. Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)                x3    @Rs.180.00     = Rs.540.00  +Extra Spicy, Green Chutney |
  |   3. Mint Raita                         x1     @Rs.80.00      = Rs.80.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                    Rs.1520.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.243.20                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                       Rs.1763.20                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders                                                                              |
  |   -> Creates order record (type: dine_in, status: completed)                                     |
  |   -> Server-side tax calc: Rs.1520.00 x 16% = Rs.243.20                                          |
  |   -> Updates table T-05 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_sales_receipt | priority: 0                                            |
  |   -> Idempotency key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0-7193-4502-ae3c-265cfb050f36            |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders                                                                                    |
  |   id: fb1293e0... | order_number: 260213-001 | type: dine_in                                     |
  |   status: completed | subtotal: 152000 | tax: 24320 | total: 176320                              |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_items (3 rows)                                                                      |
  |   1: Chicken Biryani                | qty: 2 | price:  45000 | total:   90000                    |
  |   2: Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)            | qty: 3 | price:  18000 | total:   54000                    |
  |   3: Mint Raita                     | qty: 1 | price:   8000 | total:    8000                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_status_log                                                                          |
  |   status: completed | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T13:45:00+00:00                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_sales_receipt | status: pending -> processing -> completed                    |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: fb1293e0... | priority: 0                                      |
  |   idempotency_key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0...                                        |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: salesreceipt | action: create | status: success                                     |
  |   qb_entity_type: SalesReceipt | qb_doc_number: 260213-001                                       |
  |   amount_paisa: 176320 | http_status: 200 | duration_ms: ~450                                    |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  SalesReceipt  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/salesreceipt] -----------------+
  |   DocNumber: 260213-001                                                                          |
  |   TxnDate: 2026-02-13                                                                            |
  |   Customer: Walk-In Customer                                                                     |
  |   TotalAmt: 1763.20 PKR                                                                          |
  |   Tax: 243.20 PKR                                                                                |
  |   DepositTo: Cash Register                                                                       |
  |   PaymentMethod: Cash                                                                            |
  |   Note: Dine-In order 260213-001 | Table: T-05                                                   |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Line Items (3):                                                                                |
  |     [1] Chicken Biryani                                                                          |
  |         Qty 2 x 450.00 = 900.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Food Sales" (default)                                                        |
  |     [2] Seekh Kabab (6 pcs) (Extra Spicy, Green Chutney)                                         |
  |         Qty 3 x 180.00 = 540.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Food Sales" (default)                                                        |
  |     [3] Mint Raita                                                                               |
  |         Qty 1 x 80.00 = 80.00 PKR                                                                |
  |         -> Income: "Food Sales" (default)                                                        |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Double-Entry Effect:                                                                           |
  |     DR  Cash Register                                         1763.20                            |
  |     CR  Food Sales                                            1520.00                            |
  |     CR  VAT Payable                                            243.20                            |

                                SCENARIO 3: Voided Order  ->  QB CreditMemo

=========================================================================================================
                                       TEMPLATE: chinese_restaurant                                      
                                  Chinese / Pakistani-Chinese Restaurant                                 
=========================================================================================================

  Chinese and Pakistani-Chinese fusion. Manchurian, chowmein, fried rice, soups. Delivery-heavy. MSG-free options. FBR + PRA for Pakistan-based.

  ACCOUNT MAPPINGS (26 total):
  Type           D Account Name                               QB Account Type                 
  -------------- - ------------------------------------------ --------------------------------
  INCOME         * Chinese Entree Sales                       Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Rice & Noodle Sales                        Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Soup Sales                                 Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Starter & Dim Sum Sales                    Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Beverage Sales                             Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Delivery Revenue                           Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
  COGS           * Meat & Seafood Cost                        Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Noodle & Rice Cost                         Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Sauce & Condiment Cost                     Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Vegetable Cost                             Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
  TAX            * FBR GST Payable (17%)                      Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
                   PRA PST Payable (16%)                      Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  BANK           * Cash Register                              Bank/CashOnHand                 
                   Bank Account (Card Settlements)            Bank/Checking                   
                   JazzCash Settlement                        Bank/Checking                   
                   Easypaisa Settlement                       Bank/Checking                   
                   Foodpanda Settlement                       Other Current Asset/OtherCurrentAssets
  EXPENSE          Rider Commission                           Expense/CommissionsAndFees      
  DISCOUNT       * Discount Given                             Income/DiscountsRefundsGiven    
  ROUNDING       * Rounding Adjustment                        Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  CASH O/S       * Cash Over/Short                            Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  TIPS           * Tips Payable                               Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  GIFT CARD      * Gift Card Liability                        Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  LIABILITY      * Customer Deposits                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  DELIVERY       * Delivery Expense                           Expense/Travel                  
  PLATFORM       * Platform Commission (Foodpanda)            Expense/CommissionsAndFees      

  VALIDATION:
    OK    All 7 required types present with defaults

=========================================================================================================
                          SCENARIO 1: Completed Dine-In Order  ->  QB SalesReceipt                       
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Dine-In --------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-001 | Dine-In | Table: T-05 | Pay: Cash                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Chicken Biryani                    x2    @Rs.450.00     = Rs.900.00                         |
  |   2. Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)                x3    @Rs.180.00     = Rs.540.00  +Extra Spicy, Green Chutney |
  |   3. Mint Raita                         x1     @Rs.80.00      = Rs.80.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                    Rs.1520.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.243.20                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                       Rs.1763.20                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders                                                                              |
  |   -> Creates order record (type: dine_in, status: completed)                                     |
  |   -> Server-side tax calc: Rs.1520.00 x 16% = Rs.243.20                                          |
  |   -> Updates table T-05 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_sales_receipt | priority: 0                                            |
  |   -> Idempotency key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0-7193-4502-ae3c-265cfb050f36            |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders                                                                                    |
  |   id: fb1293e0... | order_number: 260213-001 | type: dine_in                                     |
  |   status: completed | subtotal: 152000 | tax: 24320 | total: 176320                              |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_items (3 rows)                                                                      |
  |   1: Chicken Biryani                | qty: 2 | price:  45000 | total:   90000                    |
  |   2: Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)            | qty: 3 | price:  18000 | total:   54000                    |
  |   3: Mint Raita                     | qty: 1 | price:   8000 | total:    8000                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_status_log                                                                          |
  |   status: completed | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T13:45:00+00:00                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_sales_receipt | status: pending -> processing -> completed                    |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: fb1293e0... | priority: 0                                      |
  |   idempotency_key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0...                                        |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: salesreceipt | action: create | status: success                                     |
  |   qb_entity_type: SalesReceipt | qb_doc_number: 260213-001                                       |
  |   amount_paisa: 176320 | http_status: 200 | duration_ms: ~450                                    |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  SalesReceipt  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/salesreceipt] -----------------+
  |   DocNumber: 260213-001                                                                          |
  |   TxnDate: 2026-02-13                                                                            |
  |   Customer: Walk-In Customer                                                                     |
  |   TotalAmt: 1763.20 PKR                                                                          |
  |   Tax: 243.20 PKR                                                                                |
  |   DepositTo: Cash Register                                                                       |
  |   PaymentMethod: Cash                                                                            |
  |   Note: Dine-In order 260213-001 | Table: T-05                                                   |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Line Items (3):                                                                                |
  |     [1] Chicken Biryani                                                                          |
  |         Qty 2 x 450.00 = 900.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Rice & Noodle Sales" (category match)                                        |
  |     [2] Seekh Kabab (6 pcs) (Extra Spicy, Green Chutney)                                         |
  |         Qty 3 x 180.00 = 540.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Chinese Entree Sales" (default)                                              |
  |     [3] Mint Raita                                                                               |
  |         Qty 1 x 80.00 = 80.00 PKR                                                                |
  |         -> Income: "Chinese Entree Sales" (default)                                              |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Double-Entry Effect:                                                                           |
  |     DR  Cash Register                                         1763.20                            |
  |     CR  Rice & Noodle Sales                                    900.00                            |
  |     CR  Chinese Entree Sales                                   620.00                            |
  |     CR  FBR GST Payable (17%)                                  243.20                            |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

  |   -> Updates table T-12 status: occupied -> available                                            |

  |   -> Validates: refund Rs.500.00 <= order total Rs.1825.60                                       |
  |   -> Creates refund record linked to order                                                       |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |

  |                                                                                                  |

  |   Cash                               Rs.1763.20                                                  |
  |   Credit Card                        Rs.1825.60                                                  |

  |   Foodpanda                          Rs.1693.60                                                  |

                                                    v

  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (type: daily_summary)                                 |
  |   -> Aggregates all completed orders for 2026-02-13                                              |

  |   -> Enqueues job: create_deposit | priority: 5                                                  |

                                                    |
                                                    v

  |   [1] job_type: create_journal_entry | status: completed | priority: 5                           |
  |   [2] job_type: create_deposit | status: completed | priority: 5                                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log (2 entries)                                                                   |
  |   [1] sync_type: journal_entry | qb_doc_number: DAILY-2026-02-13 | status: success               |
  |   [2] sync_type: deposit | status: success                                                       |

  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  JournalEntry  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/journalentry] -----------------+
  |   DocNumber: DAILY-2026-02-13                                                                    |

  |   Note: POS daily summary 2026-02-13: 4 orders, Subtotal 6590.00 PKR, Disc 100.00 PKR, Tax 1054.40 PKR, Collected 7544.40 PKR |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Line Items (3):                                                                                |
  |     [1]  Debit: 7544.40 PKR                                                                      |
  |         Account: "Cash Register"                                                                 |
  |         Memo: Daily sales (4 orders) - 2026-02-13                                                |
  |     [2] Credit: 6490.00 PKR                                                                      |

=========================================================================================================
                                          TEMPLATE: pizza_chain                                          
                                          Pizza Chain / Pizzeria                                         
=========================================================================================================

  Pizza franchise or independent. Delivery-first (50%+). Combo deals. Cheese/dough are dominant COGS. Dine-in + delivery + marketplace.

  ACCOUNT MAPPINGS (25 total):
  Type           D Account Name                               QB Account Type                 
  -------------- - ------------------------------------------ --------------------------------
  INCOME         * Pizza Sales                                Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Side & Appetizer Sales                     Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Beverage Sales                             Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Combo Deal Sales                           Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Delivery Revenue                           Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Dine-In Revenue                            Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
  COGS           * Cheese & Dairy Cost                        Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Dough & Flour Cost                         Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Topping & Meat Cost                        Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Sauce Cost                                 Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Box & Packaging Cost                       Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
  TAX            * Sales Tax Payable                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  BANK           * Cash Register                              Bank/CashOnHand                 
                   Bank Account (Card Settlements)            Bank/Checking                   
                   Online Payment Settlement                  Bank/Checking                   
                   Marketplace Settlement Receivable          Other Current Asset/OtherCurrentAssets
  EXPENSE          Rider Commission                           Expense/CommissionsAndFees      
  DISCOUNT       * Discount Given                             Income/DiscountsRefundsGiven    
  ROUNDING       * Rounding Adjustment                        Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  CASH O/S       * Cash Over/Short                            Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  TIPS           * Tips Payable                               Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  GIFT CARD      * Gift Card Liability                        Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  LIABILITY      * Customer Deposits                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  DELIVERY       * Delivery Expense                           Expense/Travel                  
  PLATFORM       * Marketplace Platform Commission            Expense/CommissionsAndFees      

  VALIDATION:
    OK    All 7 required types present with defaults

=========================================================================================================
                          SCENARIO 1: Completed Dine-In Order  ->  QB SalesReceipt                       
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Dine-In --------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-001 | Dine-In | Table: T-05 | Pay: Cash                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Chicken Biryani                    x2    @Rs.450.00     = Rs.900.00                         |
  |   2. Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)                x3    @Rs.180.00     = Rs.540.00  +Extra Spicy, Green Chutney |
  |   3. Mint Raita                         x1     @Rs.80.00      = Rs.80.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                    Rs.1520.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.243.20                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                       Rs.1763.20                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders                                                                              |
  |   -> Creates order record (type: dine_in, status: completed)                                     |
  |   -> Server-side tax calc: Rs.1520.00 x 16% = Rs.243.20                                          |
  |   -> Updates table T-05 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_sales_receipt | priority: 0                                            |
  |   -> Idempotency key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0-7193-4502-ae3c-265cfb050f36            |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders                                                                                    |
  |   id: fb1293e0... | order_number: 260213-001 | type: dine_in                                     |
  |   status: completed | subtotal: 152000 | tax: 24320 | total: 176320                              |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_items (3 rows)                                                                      |
  |   1: Chicken Biryani                | qty: 2 | price:  45000 | total:   90000                    |
  |   2: Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)            | qty: 3 | price:  18000 | total:   54000                    |
  |   3: Mint Raita                     | qty: 1 | price:   8000 | total:    8000                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_status_log                                                                          |
  |   status: completed | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T13:45:00+00:00                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_sales_receipt | status: pending -> processing -> completed                    |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: fb1293e0... | priority: 0                                      |
  |   idempotency_key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0...                                        |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: salesreceipt | action: create | status: success                                     |
  |   qb_entity_type: SalesReceipt | qb_doc_number: 260213-001                                       |
  |   amount_paisa: 176320 | http_status: 200 | duration_ms: ~450                                    |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  SalesReceipt  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/salesreceipt] -----------------+

  |   TotalAmt: 1763.20 PKR                                                                          |
  |   Tax: 243.20 PKR                                                                                |
  |   DepositTo: Cash Register                                                                       |
  |   PaymentMethod: Cash                                                                            |
  |   Note: Dine-In order 260213-001 | Table: T-05                                                   |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Line Items (3):                                                                                |
  |     [1] Chicken Biryani                                                                          |
  |         Qty 2 x 450.00 = 900.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Pizza Sales" (default)                                                       |
  |     [2] Seekh Kabab (6 pcs) (Extra Spicy, Green Chutney)                                         |
  |         Qty 3 x 180.00 = 540.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Pizza Sales" (default)                                                       |
  |     [3] Mint Raita                                                                               |
  |         Qty 1 x 80.00 = 80.00 PKR                                                                |
  |         -> Income: "Pizza Sales" (default)                                                       |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Double-Entry Effect:                                                                           |

  |     CR  Pizza Sales                                           1520.00                            |

  |   -> Creates refund record linked to order                                                       |

  |   -> Enqueues job: create_refund_receipt | priority: 0                                           |

=========================================================================================================
                                          TEMPLATE: burger_joint                                         
                                    Burger Joint / American Fast Food                                    
=========================================================================================================

  Burger restaurant: beef/chicken burgers, fries, shakes. High customization. Combo meals. Delivery-friendly. Patty COGS dominant.

  ACCOUNT MAPPINGS (25 total):
  Type           D Account Name                               QB Account Type                 
  -------------- - ------------------------------------------ --------------------------------
  INCOME         * Burger Sales                               Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Fries & Sides Sales                        Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Shake & Beverage Sales                     Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Combo Meal Sales                           Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Wrap & Sandwich Sales                      Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Delivery Revenue                           Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
  COGS           * Patty & Meat Cost                          Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Bun & Bread Cost                           Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Sauce & Topping Cost                       Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Fries & Oil Cost                           Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Packaging Cost                             Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
  TAX            * Sales Tax Payable                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  BANK           * Cash Register                              Bank/CashOnHand                 
                   Bank Account (Card Settlements)            Bank/Checking                   
                   Online Payment Settlement                  Bank/Checking                   
                   Marketplace Settlement Receivable          Other Current Asset/OtherCurrentAssets
  EXPENSE          Rider Commission                           Expense/CommissionsAndFees      
  DISCOUNT       * Discount Given                             Income/DiscountsRefundsGiven    
  ROUNDING       * Rounding Adjustment                        Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  CASH O/S       * Cash Over/Short                            Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  TIPS           * Tips Payable                               Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  GIFT CARD      * Gift Card Liability                        Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  LIABILITY      * Customer Deposits                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  DELIVERY       * Delivery Expense                           Expense/Travel                  
  PLATFORM       * Marketplace Platform Commission            Expense/CommissionsAndFees      

  VALIDATION:
    OK    All 7 required types present with defaults

=========================================================================================================
                          SCENARIO 1: Completed Dine-In Order  ->  QB SalesReceipt                       
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Dine-In --------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-001 | Dine-In | Table: T-05 | Pay: Cash                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Chicken Biryani                    x2    @Rs.450.00     = Rs.900.00                         |
  |   2. Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)                x3    @Rs.180.00     = Rs.540.00  +Extra Spicy, Green Chutney |
  |   3. Mint Raita                         x1     @Rs.80.00      = Rs.80.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                    Rs.1520.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.243.20                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                       Rs.1763.20                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders                                                                              |
  |   -> Creates order record (type: dine_in, status: completed)                                     |
  |   -> Server-side tax calc: Rs.1520.00 x 16% = Rs.243.20                                          |
  |   -> Updates table T-05 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_sales_receipt | priority: 0                                            |
  |   -> Idempotency key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0-7193-4502-ae3c-265cfb050f36            |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders                                                                                    |
  |   id: fb1293e0... | order_number: 260213-001 | type: dine_in                                     |
  |   status: completed | subtotal: 152000 | tax: 24320 | total: 176320                              |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_items (3 rows)                                                                      |
  |   1: Chicken Biryani                | qty: 2 | price:  45000 | total:   90000                    |
  |   2: Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)            | qty: 3 | price:  18000 | total:   54000                    |
  |   3: Mint Raita                     | qty: 1 | price:   8000 | total:    8000                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_status_log                                                                          |
  |   status: completed | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T13:45:00+00:00                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_sales_receipt | status: pending -> processing -> completed                    |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: fb1293e0... | priority: 0                                      |
  |   idempotency_key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0...                                        |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: salesreceipt | action: create | status: success                                     |
  |   qb_entity_type: SalesReceipt | qb_doc_number: 260213-001                                       |
  |   amount_paisa: 176320 | http_status: 200 | duration_ms: ~450                                    |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  SalesReceipt  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/salesreceipt] -----------------+

  |   TxnDate: 2026-02-13                                                                            |
  |   Customer: Walk-In Customer                                                                     |
  |   TotalAmt: 1763.20 PKR                                                                          |
  |   Tax: 243.20 PKR                                                                                |
  |   DepositTo: Cash Register                                                                       |
  |   PaymentMethod: Cash                                                                            |

  |                                                                                                  |

  |     [1] Chicken Biryani                                                                          |
  |         Qty 2 x 450.00 = 900.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Burger Sales" (default)                                                      |
  |     [2] Seekh Kabab (6 pcs) (Extra Spicy, Green Chutney)                                         |
  |         Qty 3 x 180.00 = 540.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Burger Sales" (default)                                                      |
  |     [3] Mint Raita                                                                               |
  |         Qty 1 x 80.00 = 80.00 PKR                                                                |
  |         -> Income: "Fries & Sides Sales" (category match)                                        |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Double-Entry Effect:                                                                           |
  |     DR  Cash Register                                         1763.20                            |
  |     CR  Burger Sales                                          1440.00                            |
  |     CR  Fries & Sides Sales                                     80.00                            |
  |     CR  Sales Tax Payable                                      243.20                            |

                                SCENARIO 3: Voided Order  ->  QB CreditMemo                              
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Dine-In --------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-003 | Dine-In | Table: T-12 | Pay: Cash                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Mutton Biryani                     x1    @Rs.550.00     = Rs.550.00                         |
  |   2. Naan                               x2     @Rs.40.00      = Rs.80.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                     Rs.630.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.100.80                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                        Rs.730.80                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders/ea596192-0fc9-403f-ac7f-2bfcbb84e655/void                                    |
  |   -> Updates order status: completed -> voided                                                   |
  |   -> Logs status change: voided (reason: Wrong order delivered — voided by manager)              |
  |   -> Updates table T-12 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_credit_memo | priority: 0                                              |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders                                                                                    |

  |   status: voided | subtotal: 63000 | tax: 10080 | total: 73080                                   |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_items (2 rows)                                                                      |
  |   1: Mutton Biryani                 | qty: 1 | price:  55000 | total:   55000                    |
  |   2: Naan                           | qty: 2 | price:   4000 | total:    8000                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_status_log                                                                          |
  |   status: voided | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T15:10:00+00:00                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_credit_memo | status: pending -> processing -> completed                      |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: ea596192... | priority: 0                                      |
  |   idempotency_key: create_credit_memo:order:ea596192...                                          |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |

                        SCENARIO 4: Partial Refund (Rs.500.00)  ->  QB RefundReceipt

  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Refund ---------------------------------------------------------------------+

                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders/22da109b-1eb0-45ed-907f-3ad5a367d560/refund  (body: amount=50000)            |
  |   -> Validates: refund Rs.500.00 <= order total Rs.1825.60                                       |
  |   -> Creates refund record linked to order                                                       |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_refund_receipt | priority: 0                                           |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders (no change - original order stays completed)                                       |
  |   id: 22da109b... | order_number: 260213-002 | status: completed                                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_refund_receipt | status: pending -> completed                                 |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: 22da109b... | priority: 0                                      |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: refund_receipt | action: create | status: success                                   |
  |   qb_entity_type: RefundReceipt | qb_doc_number: REF-260213-002                                  |

  | -------------------- ------- -------------- ------------ --------------                          |

  | Foodpanda                  1     Rs.1460.00    Rs.233.60     Rs.1693.60                          |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TOTALS                     4     Rs.6590.00   Rs.1054.40     Rs.7544.40                          |
  |   Discounts: -Rs.100.00                                                                          |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | Payment Method Breakdown:                                                                        |
  |   Cash                               Rs.1763.20                                                  |
  |   Credit Card                        Rs.1825.60                                                  |
  |   JazzCash                           Rs.2262.00                                                  |
  |   Foodpanda                          Rs.1693.60                                                  |

                                                    v

  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (type: daily_summary)                                 |
  |   -> Aggregates all completed orders for 2026-02-13                                              |

  |   -> Enqueues job: create_deposit | priority: 5                                                  |

                                                    |

  |   [2] job_type: create_deposit | status: completed | priority: 5                                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log (2 entries)                                                                   |
  |   [1] sync_type: journal_entry | qb_doc_number: DAILY-2026-02-13 | status: success               |
  |   [2] sync_type: deposit | status: success                                                       |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

                                           TEMPLATE: steakhouse                                          
                                            Steakhouse / Grill

  Premium steakhouse. Imported/aged beef. High-value COGS. Wine pairings. Service charge. Private dining. Minimal takeaway.

=========================================================================================================
                 SCENARIO 2: Completed Takeaway Order (with discount)  ->  QB SalesReceipt               
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Takeaway -------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-002 | Takeaway | Customer: Ahmed Khan | Pay: Credit Card                           |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Chicken Karahi (Half)              x1   @Rs.1200.00    = Rs.1200.00  [Less oil]             |
  |   2. Tandoori Naan                      x4     @Rs.40.00     = Rs.160.00                         |
  |   3. Lassi (Sweet)                      x2    @Rs.150.00     = Rs.300.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                    Rs.1660.00                        |
  |   Discount:                                                    -Rs.100.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.265.60                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                       Rs.1825.60                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders                                                                              |
  |   -> Creates order record (type: takeaway, status: completed)                                    |
  |   -> Server-side tax calc: Rs.1660.00 x 16% = Rs.265.60                                          |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_sales_receipt | priority: 0                                            |
  |   -> Idempotency key: create_sales_receipt:order:22da109b-1eb0-45ed-907f-3ad5a367d560            |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v

  | TABLE: order_items (3 rows)                                                                      |

  |   3: Lassi (Sweet)                  | qty: 2 | price:  15000 | total:   30000                    |
  |                                                                                                  |

  |   status: completed | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T14:20:00+00:00                 |

  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_sales_receipt | status: pending -> processing -> completed                    |

                                SCENARIO 3: Voided Order  ->  QB CreditMemo                              
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Dine-In --------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-003 | Dine-In | Table: T-12 | Pay: Cash                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Mutton Biryani                     x1    @Rs.550.00     = Rs.550.00                         |
  |   2. Naan                               x2     @Rs.40.00      = Rs.80.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                     Rs.630.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.100.80                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                        Rs.730.80                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders/ea596192-0fc9-403f-ac7f-2bfcbb84e655/void                                    |
  |   -> Updates order status: completed -> voided                                                   |
  |   -> Logs status change: voided (reason: Wrong order delivered — voided by manager)              |
  |   -> Updates table T-12 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_credit_memo | priority: 0                                              |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders                                                                                    |
  |   id: ea596192... | order_number: 260213-003 | type: dine_in                                     |
  |   status: voided | subtotal: 63000 | tax: 10080 | total: 73080                                   |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_items (2 rows)                                                                      |
  |   1: Mutton Biryani                 | qty: 1 | price:  55000 | total:   55000                    |
  |   2: Naan                           | qty: 2 | price:   4000 | total:    8000                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_status_log                                                                          |
  |   status: voided | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T15:10:00+00:00                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_credit_memo | status: pending -> processing -> completed                      |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: ea596192... | priority: 0                                      |
  |   idempotency_key: create_credit_memo:order:ea596192...                                          |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: creditmemo | action: create | status: success                                       |
  |   qb_entity_type: CreditMemo | qb_doc_number: VOID-260213-003                                    |

                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  CreditMemo  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/creditmemo] ---------------------+

  |   Tax: 100.80 PKR                                                                                |
  |   Note: Void of order 260213-003 — Wrong order delivered — voided by manager                     |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Line Items (2):                                                                                |

  |         Qty 1 x 550.00 = 550.00 PKR                                                              |

  |         Qty 2 x 40.00 = 80.00 PKR                                                                |

                        SCENARIO 4: Partial Refund (Rs.500.00)  ->  QB RefundReceipt                     
=========================================================================================================

  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Refund ---------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Refunding Rs.500.00 against order #260213-002 (total: Rs.1825.60)                                |
  | Customer: Ahmed Khan | Reason: Customer complaint                                                |
  | Refund Method: Cash | Approved by: Manager                                                       |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders/22da109b-1eb0-45ed-907f-3ad5a367d560/refund  (body: amount=50000)            |
  |   -> Validates: refund Rs.500.00 <= order total Rs.1825.60                                       |
  |   -> Creates refund record linked to order                                                       |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_refund_receipt | priority: 0                                           |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders (no change - original order stays completed)                                       |
  |   id: 22da109b... | order_number: 260213-002 | status: completed                                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_refund_receipt | status: pending -> completed                                 |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: 22da109b... | priority: 0                                      |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: refund_receipt | action: create | status: success                                   |
  |   qb_entity_type: RefundReceipt | qb_doc_number: REF-260213-002                                  |
  |   amount_paisa: 50000 | http_status: 200                                                         |

  |   Foodpanda                          Rs.1693.60                                                  |

  |   -> Enqueues job: create_deposit | priority: 5                                                  |

  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log (2 entries)                                                                   |
  |   [1] sync_type: journal_entry | qb_doc_number: DAILY-2026-02-13 | status: success               |
  |   [2] sync_type: deposit | status: success                                                       |

=========================================================================================================
                                         TEMPLATE: japanese_sushi                                        
                                       Japanese / Sushi Restaurant                                       
=========================================================================================================

  Sushi, sashimi, ramen, tempura. Imported fish COGS (premium). Bento boxes. Minimal delivery. VAT-based.

  ACCOUNT MAPPINGS (23 total):
  Type           D Account Name                               QB Account Type                 
  -------------- - ------------------------------------------ --------------------------------
  INCOME         * Sushi & Sashimi Sales                      Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Ramen & Noodle Sales                       Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Tempura & Fried Sales                      Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Bento Box & Set Sales                      Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Beverage Sales                             Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
  COGS           * Fresh Fish & Seafood Cost                  Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Rice & Noodle Cost                         Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Sauce & Condiment Cost                     Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
  TAX            * VAT Payable                                Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
                   VAT Reduced Rate Payable                   Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  BANK           * Cash Register                              Bank/CashOnHand                 
                   Bank Account (Card Settlements)            Bank/Checking                   
                   Online Payment Settlement                  Bank/Checking                   
                   Marketplace Settlement Receivable          Other Current Asset/OtherCurrentAssets
  EXPENSE          Rider Commission                           Expense/CommissionsAndFees      
  DISCOUNT       * Discount Given                             Income/DiscountsRefundsGiven    
  ROUNDING       * Rounding Adjustment                        Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  CASH O/S       * Cash Over/Short                            Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  TIPS           * Tips Payable                               Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  GIFT CARD      * Gift Card Liability                        Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  LIABILITY      * Customer Deposits                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  DELIVERY       * Delivery Expense                           Expense/Travel                  
  PLATFORM       * Marketplace Platform Commission            Expense/CommissionsAndFees      

  VALIDATION:
    OK    All 7 required types present with defaults

  |   1. Chicken Karahi (Half)              x1   @Rs.1200.00    = Rs.1200.00  [Less oil]             |
  |   2. Tandoori Naan                      x4     @Rs.40.00     = Rs.160.00                         |
  |   3. Lassi (Sweet)                      x2    @Rs.150.00     = Rs.300.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                    Rs.1660.00                        |
  |   Discount:                                                    -Rs.100.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.265.60                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                       Rs.1825.60                        |

  | POST /api/v1/orders                                                                              |
  |   -> Creates order record (type: takeaway, status: completed)                                    |
  |   -> Server-side tax calc: Rs.1660.00 x 16% = Rs.265.60                                          |
  |                                                                                                  |

  |   -> Enqueues job: create_sales_receipt | priority: 0                                            |
