  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Refund ---------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Refunding Rs.500.00 against order #260213-002 (total: Rs.1825.60)                                |
  | Customer: Ahmed Khan | Reason: Customer complaint                                                |
  | Refund Method: Cash | Approved by: Manager                                                       |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders/22da109b-1eb0-45ed-907f-3ad5a367d560/refund  (body: amount=50000)            |
  |   -> Validates: refund Rs.500.00 <= order total Rs.1825.60                                       |
  |   -> Creates refund record linked to order                                                       |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_refund_receipt | priority: 0                                           |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders (no change - original order stays completed)                                       |
  |   id: 22da109b... | order_number: 260213-002 | status: completed                                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_refund_receipt | status: pending -> completed                                 |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: 22da109b... | priority: 0                                      |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: refund_receipt | action: create | status: success                                   |
  |   qb_entity_type: RefundReceipt | qb_doc_number: REF-260213-002                                  |
  |   amount_paisa: 50000 | http_status: 200                                                         |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  RefundReceipt  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/refundreceipt] ---------------+
  |   DocNumber: REF-260213-002                                                                      |
  |   TxnDate: 2026-02-13                                                                            |
  |   Customer: Ahmed Khan                                                                           |
  |   TotalAmt: 500.00 PKR                                                                           |
  |   DepositTo: Cash Register                                                                       |
  |   Note: Refund for order 260213-002                                                              |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Line Items (1):                                                                                |
  |     [1] Partial refund for order 260213-002                                                      |
  |         Qty 1 x 500.00 = 500.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Food Sales" (default)                                                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

  |   Foodpanda                          Rs.1693.60                                                  |

=========================================================================================================
                                      TEMPLATE: franchise_operation                                      
                                           Franchise Operation                                           
=========================================================================================================

  Franchise model. Royalty fees (5-8%), marketing fund (2-3%), brand license. Territory fees. Franchisor reporting. FBR + PRA.

  ACCOUNT MAPPINGS (29 total):
  Type           D Account Name                               QB Account Type                 
  -------------- - ------------------------------------------ --------------------------------
  INCOME         * Counter Sales                              Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Drive-Through Revenue                      Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Delivery Revenue                           Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Marketplace Revenue                        Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Combo Meal Sales                           Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Beverage Sales                             Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Add-On & Sides Sales                       Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
  COGS           * Food Cost                                  Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Beverage Cost                              Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Packaging Cost                             Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
  TAX            * FBR GST Payable (17%)                      Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
                   PRA PST Payable (16%)                      Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  BANK           * Cash Register                              Bank/CashOnHand                 
                   Bank Account (Card Settlements)            Bank/Checking                   
                   JazzCash Settlement                        Bank/Checking                   
                   Easypaisa Settlement                       Bank/Checking                   
                   Foodpanda Settlement                       Other Current Asset/OtherCurrentAssets
  EXPENSE          Rider Commission                           Expense/CommissionsAndFees      
                   Royalty Fee Expense                        Expense/CommissionsAndFees      
                   Marketing Fund Contribution                Expense/AdvertisingPromotional  
                   Brand License Fee                          Expense/LegalProfessionalFees   
  DISCOUNT       * Discount Given                             Income/DiscountsRefundsGiven    
  ROUNDING       * Rounding Adjustment                        Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  CASH O/S       * Cash Over/Short                            Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  TIPS           * Tips Payable                               Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  GIFT CARD      * Gift Card Liability                        Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  LIABILITY      * Customer Deposits                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  DELIVERY       * Delivery Expense                           Expense/Travel                  
  PLATFORM       * Platform Commission (Foodpanda)            Expense/CommissionsAndFees      

  VALIDATION:
    OK    All 7 required types present with defaults

                          SCENARIO 1: Completed Dine-In Order  ->  QB SalesReceipt                       
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Dine-In --------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-001 | Dine-In | Table: T-05 | Pay: Cash                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Chicken Biryani                    x2    @Rs.450.00     = Rs.900.00                         |
  |   2. Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)                x3    @Rs.180.00     = Rs.540.00  +Extra Spicy, Green Chutney |
  |   3. Mint Raita                         x1     @Rs.80.00      = Rs.80.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                    Rs.1520.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.243.20                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                       Rs.1763.20                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders                                                                              |
  |   -> Creates order record (type: dine_in, status: completed)                                     |
  |   -> Server-side tax calc: Rs.1520.00 x 16% = Rs.243.20                                          |
  |   -> Updates table T-05 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_sales_receipt | priority: 0                                            |
  |   -> Idempotency key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0-7193-4502-ae3c-265cfb050f36            |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders                                                                                    |
  |   id: fb1293e0... | order_number: 260213-001 | type: dine_in                                     |
  |   status: completed | subtotal: 152000 | tax: 24320 | total: 176320                              |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_items (3 rows)                                                                      |
  |   1: Chicken Biryani                | qty: 2 | price:  45000 | total:   90000                    |
  |   2: Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)            | qty: 3 | price:  18000 | total:   54000                    |
  |   3: Mint Raita                     | qty: 1 | price:   8000 | total:    8000                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_status_log                                                                          |
  |   status: completed | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T13:45:00+00:00                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_sales_receipt | status: pending -> processing -> completed                    |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: fb1293e0... | priority: 0                                      |
  |   idempotency_key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0...                                        |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: salesreceipt | action: create | status: success                                     |
  |   qb_entity_type: SalesReceipt | qb_doc_number: 260213-001                                       |
  |   amount_paisa: 176320 | http_status: 200 | duration_ms: ~450                                    |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  SalesReceipt  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/salesreceipt] -----------------+

  |     [2] Seekh Kabab (6 pcs) (Extra Spicy, Green Chutney)                                         |
  |         Qty 3 x 180.00 = 540.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Counter Sales" (default)                                                     |
  |     [3] Mint Raita                                                                               |
  |         Qty 1 x 80.00 = 80.00 PKR                                                                |

                           SCENARIO 5: Daily Close  ->  QB JournalEntry + Deposit                        
=========================================================================================================

  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  End of Day Close -----------------------------------------------------------+

  |                                                                                                  |
  | Channel               Orders        Revenue          Tax          Total                          |

  |   [2] sync_type: deposit | status: success                                                       |

=========================================================================================================
                                      TEMPLATE: multi_brand_operator                                     
                                     Multi-Brand Operator (3+ Brands)                                    
=========================================================================================================

  Runs multiple restaurant brands from shared infrastructure. Separate P&L per brand. Shared overhead allocation. Combined COGS purchasing.

  ACCOUNT MAPPINGS (27 total):
  Type           D Account Name                               QB Account Type                 
  -------------- - ------------------------------------------ --------------------------------
  INCOME         * Brand A Revenue                            Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Brand B Revenue                            Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Brand C Revenue                            Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Marketplace Revenue (Aggregated)           Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Direct Order Revenue                       Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
  COGS           * Shared Kitchen Food Cost                   Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Brand-Specific Ingredient Cost             Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Packaging Cost (Multi-Brand)               Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
  TAX            * Sales Tax Payable                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  BANK           * Cash Register                              Bank/CashOnHand                 
                   Bank Account (Card Settlements)            Bank/Checking                   
                   Online Payment Settlement                  Bank/Checking                   
                   Marketplace Settlement Receivable          Other Current Asset/OtherCurrentAssets
  EXPENSE          Rider Commission                           Expense/CommissionsAndFees      
                   Shared Overhead Allocation                 Expense/Rent                    
                   Brand-Specific Marketing                   Expense/AdvertisingPromotional  
                   Kitchen Rent                               Expense/Rent                    
                   Platform Commission (Multi)                Expense/CommissionsAndFees      
                   Virtual Brand Marketing                    Expense/AdvertisingPromotional  
  DISCOUNT       * Discount Given                             Income/DiscountsRefundsGiven    
  ROUNDING       * Rounding Adjustment                        Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  CASH O/S       * Cash Over/Short                            Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  TIPS           * Tips Payable                               Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  GIFT CARD      * Gift Card Liability                        Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  LIABILITY      * Customer Deposits                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  DELIVERY       * Delivery Expense                           Expense/Travel                  
  PLATFORM       * Marketplace Platform Commission            Expense/CommissionsAndFees      

  VALIDATION:
    OK    All 7 required types present with defaults

=========================================================================================================
                          SCENARIO 1: Completed Dine-In Order  ->  QB SalesReceipt                       
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Dine-In --------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-001 | Dine-In | Table: T-05 | Pay: Cash                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Chicken Biryani                    x2    @Rs.450.00     = Rs.900.00                         |
  |   2. Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)                x3    @Rs.180.00     = Rs.540.00  +Extra Spicy, Green Chutney |
  |   3. Mint Raita                         x1     @Rs.80.00      = Rs.80.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                    Rs.1520.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.243.20                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                       Rs.1763.20                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders                                                                              |
  |   -> Creates order record (type: dine_in, status: completed)                                     |
  |   -> Server-side tax calc: Rs.1520.00 x 16% = Rs.243.20                                          |
  |   -> Updates table T-05 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_sales_receipt | priority: 0                                            |
  |   -> Idempotency key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0-7193-4502-ae3c-265cfb050f36            |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders                                                                                    |
  |   id: fb1293e0... | order_number: 260213-001 | type: dine_in                                     |
  |   status: completed | subtotal: 152000 | tax: 24320 | total: 176320                              |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_items (3 rows)                                                                      |
  |   1: Chicken Biryani                | qty: 2 | price:  45000 | total:   90000                    |
  |   2: Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)            | qty: 3 | price:  18000 | total:   54000                    |
  |   3: Mint Raita                     | qty: 1 | price:   8000 | total:    8000                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_status_log                                                                          |
  |   status: completed | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T13:45:00+00:00                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_sales_receipt | status: pending -> processing -> completed                    |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: fb1293e0... | priority: 0                                      |
  |   idempotency_key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0...                                        |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: salesreceipt | action: create | status: success                                     |
  |   qb_entity_type: SalesReceipt | qb_doc_number: 260213-001                                       |
  |   amount_paisa: 176320 | http_status: 200 | duration_ms: ~450                                    |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  SalesReceipt  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/salesreceipt] -----------------+
  |   DocNumber: 260213-001                                                                          |
  |   TxnDate: 2026-02-13                                                                            |
  |   Customer: Walk-In Customer                                                                     |
  |   TotalAmt: 1763.20 PKR                                                                          |
  |   Tax: 243.20 PKR                                                                                |
  |   DepositTo: Cash Register                                                                       |
  |   PaymentMethod: Cash                                                                            |
  |   Note: Dine-In order 260213-001 | Table: T-05                                                   |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Line Items (3):                                                                                |
  |     [1] Chicken Biryani                                                                          |
  |         Qty 2 x 450.00 = 900.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Brand A Revenue" (default)                                                   |
  |     [2] Seekh Kabab (6 pcs) (Extra Spicy, Green Chutney)                                         |
  |         Qty 3 x 180.00 = 540.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Brand A Revenue" (default)                                                   |
  |     [3] Mint Raita                                                                               |
  |         Qty 1 x 80.00 = 80.00 PKR                                                                |
  |         -> Income: "Brand A Revenue" (default)                                                   |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Double-Entry Effect:                                                                           |
  |     DR  Cash Register                                         1763.20                            |
  |     CR  Brand A Revenue                                       1520.00                            |
  |     CR  Sales Tax Payable                                      243.20                            |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

                                SCENARIO 3: Voided Order  ->  QB CreditMemo                              
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Dine-In --------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-003 | Dine-In | Table: T-12 | Pay: Cash                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Mutton Biryani                     x1    @Rs.550.00     = Rs.550.00                         |
  |   2. Naan                               x2     @Rs.40.00      = Rs.80.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                     Rs.630.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.100.80                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                        Rs.730.80                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders/ea596192-0fc9-403f-ac7f-2bfcbb84e655/void                                    |
  |   -> Updates order status: completed -> voided                                                   |
  |   -> Logs status change: voided (reason: Wrong order delivered — voided by manager)              |
  |   -> Updates table T-12 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_credit_memo | priority: 0                                              |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders                                                                                    |
  |   id: ea596192... | order_number: 260213-003 | type: dine_in                                     |
  |   status: voided | subtotal: 63000 | tax: 10080 | total: 73080                                   |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_items (2 rows)                                                                      |
  |   1: Mutton Biryani                 | qty: 1 | price:  55000 | total:   55000                    |
  |   2: Naan                           | qty: 2 | price:   4000 | total:    8000                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_status_log                                                                          |
  |   status: voided | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T15:10:00+00:00                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_credit_memo | status: pending -> processing -> completed                      |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: ea596192... | priority: 0                                      |
  |   idempotency_key: create_credit_memo:order:ea596192...                                          |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: creditmemo | action: create | status: success                                       |
  |   qb_entity_type: CreditMemo | qb_doc_number: VOID-260213-003                                    |

                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  CreditMemo  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/creditmemo] ---------------------+

  |   TxnDate: 2026-02-13                                                                            |
  |   Customer: Walk-In Customer                                                                     |
  |   TotalAmt: 730.80 PKR                                                                           |
  |   Tax: 100.80 PKR                                                                                |
  |   Note: Void of order 260213-003 — Wrong order delivered — voided by manager                     |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Line Items (2):                                                                                |

  |         Qty 1 x 550.00 = 550.00 PKR                                                              |

  |                                                                                                  |

  |     DR  Brand A Revenue                                        630.00                            |
  |     DR  Sales Tax Payable                                      100.80                            |

                        SCENARIO 4: Partial Refund (Rs.500.00)  ->  QB RefundReceipt

  | POST /api/v1/orders/22da109b-1eb0-45ed-907f-3ad5a367d560/refund  (body: amount=50000)            |
  |   -> Validates: refund Rs.500.00 <= order total Rs.1825.60                                       |
  |   -> Creates refund record linked to order                                                       |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_refund_receipt | priority: 0                                           |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+

  |   id: 22da109b... | order_number: 260213-002 | status: completed                                 |

  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_refund_receipt | status: pending -> completed                                 |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: 22da109b... | priority: 0                                      |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: refund_receipt | action: create | status: success                                   |
  |   qb_entity_type: RefundReceipt | qb_doc_number: REF-260213-002                                  |

=========================================================================================================
                                   TEMPLATE: subscription_meal_service                                   
                                    Subscription Meal / Tiffin Service                                   
=========================================================================================================

  Weekly/monthly meal subscriptions. Tiffin delivery. Route-based logistics. Deferred revenue for prepaid plans. Corporate meal programs.

  ACCOUNT MAPPINGS (18 total):
  Type           D Account Name                               QB Account Type                 
  -------------- - ------------------------------------------ --------------------------------
  INCOME         * Weekly Subscription Revenue                Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Monthly Subscription Revenue               Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   One-Time Meal Order Revenue                Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Corporate Meal Plan Revenue                Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
  COGS           * Meal Prep Food Cost                        Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Container & Packaging Cost                 Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Route Delivery Cost                        Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
  TAX            * Sales Tax Payable                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  BANK           * Cash Register                              Bank/CashOnHand                 
                   Bank Account (Card Settlements)            Bank/Checking                   
                   Online Payment Settlement                  Bank/Checking                   
  DISCOUNT       * Discount Given                             Income/DiscountsRefundsGiven    
  ROUNDING       * Rounding Adjustment                        Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  CASH O/S       * Cash Over/Short                            Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  TIPS           * Tips Payable                               Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  GIFT CARD      * Gift Card Liability                        Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  LIABILITY      * Customer Deposits                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
                   Deferred Subscription Revenue              Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities

  VALIDATION:
    OK    All 7 required types present with defaults

                          SCENARIO 1: Completed Dine-In Order  ->  QB SalesReceipt                       
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Dine-In --------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-001 | Dine-In | Table: T-05 | Pay: Cash                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Chicken Biryani                    x2    @Rs.450.00     = Rs.900.00                         |
  |   2. Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)                x3    @Rs.180.00     = Rs.540.00  +Extra Spicy, Green Chutney |
  |   3. Mint Raita                         x1     @Rs.80.00      = Rs.80.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                    Rs.1520.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.243.20                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                       Rs.1763.20                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders                                                                              |
  |   -> Creates order record (type: dine_in, status: completed)                                     |
  |   -> Server-side tax calc: Rs.1520.00 x 16% = Rs.243.20                                          |
  |   -> Updates table T-05 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_sales_receipt | priority: 0                                            |
  |   -> Idempotency key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0-7193-4502-ae3c-265cfb050f36            |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v

  | TABLE: orders                                                                                    |

  |   3: Mint Raita                     | qty: 1 | price:   8000 | total:    8000                    |

  |   status: completed | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T13:45:00+00:00                 |

  |   job_type: create_sales_receipt | status: pending -> processing -> completed                    |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: fb1293e0... | priority: 0                                      |
  |   idempotency_key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0...                                        |
  |                                                                                                  |

  |   qb_entity_type: SalesReceipt | qb_doc_number: 260213-001                                       |

=========================================================================================================
                                       TEMPLATE: marketplace_heavy                                       
                          Marketplace-Heavy Restaurant (60%+ Delivery Platforms)                         
=========================================================================================================

  Highly dependent on Foodpanda, Cheetay, UberEats. Multi-platform commission tracking. Platform-specific settlement accounts. Minimal dine-in.

  ACCOUNT MAPPINGS (27 total):
  Type           D Account Name                               QB Account Type                 
  -------------- - ------------------------------------------ --------------------------------
  INCOME         * Foodpanda Revenue                          Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Cheetay Revenue                            Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   UberEats Revenue                           Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Direct Order Revenue                       Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Walk-In Revenue                            Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
  COGS           * Food Cost                                  Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Packaging Cost (Platform-Branded)          Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
  TAX            * FBR GST Payable (17%)                      Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
                   PRA PST Payable (16%)                      Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  BANK           * Cash Register                              Bank/CashOnHand                 
                   Bank Account (Card Settlements)            Bank/Checking                   
                   JazzCash Settlement                        Bank/Checking                   
                   Easypaisa Settlement                       Bank/Checking                   
                   Foodpanda Settlement A/C                   Other Current Asset/OtherCurrentAssets
                   Cheetay Settlement A/C                     Other Current Asset/OtherCurrentAssets
                   UberEats Settlement A/C                    Other Current Asset/OtherCurrentAssets
  EXPENSE          Cheetay Commission                         Expense/CommissionsAndFees      
                   UberEats Commission                        Expense/CommissionsAndFees      
                   Platform Marketing Spend                   Expense/AdvertisingPromotional  
  DISCOUNT       * Discount Given                             Income/DiscountsRefundsGiven    
  ROUNDING       * Rounding Adjustment                        Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  CASH O/S       * Cash Over/Short                            Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  TIPS           * Tips Payable                               Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  GIFT CARD      * Gift Card Liability                        Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  LIABILITY      * Customer Deposits                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  DELIVERY       * Delivery Expense                           Expense/Travel                  
  PLATFORM       * Foodpanda Commission                       Expense/CommissionsAndFees      

  VALIDATION:
    OK    All 7 required types present with defaults

=========================================================================================================
                          SCENARIO 1: Completed Dine-In Order  ->  QB SalesReceipt                       
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Dine-In --------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-001 | Dine-In | Table: T-05 | Pay: Cash                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Chicken Biryani                    x2    @Rs.450.00     = Rs.900.00                         |
  |   2. Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)                x3    @Rs.180.00     = Rs.540.00  +Extra Spicy, Green Chutney |
  |   3. Mint Raita                         x1     @Rs.80.00      = Rs.80.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                    Rs.1520.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.243.20                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                       Rs.1763.20                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders                                                                              |
  |   -> Creates order record (type: dine_in, status: completed)                                     |
  |   -> Server-side tax calc: Rs.1520.00 x 16% = Rs.243.20                                          |
  |   -> Updates table T-05 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_sales_receipt | priority: 0                                            |
  |   -> Idempotency key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0-7193-4502-ae3c-265cfb050f36            |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: orders                                                                                    |
  |   id: fb1293e0... | order_number: 260213-001 | type: dine_in                                     |
  |   status: completed | subtotal: 152000 | tax: 24320 | total: 176320                              |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_items (3 rows)                                                                      |
  |   1: Chicken Biryani                | qty: 2 | price:  45000 | total:   90000                    |
  |   2: Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)            | qty: 3 | price:  18000 | total:   54000                    |
  |   3: Mint Raita                     | qty: 1 | price:   8000 | total:    8000                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_status_log                                                                          |
  |   status: completed | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T13:45:00+00:00                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_sales_receipt | status: pending -> processing -> completed                    |
  |   entity_type: order | entity_id: fb1293e0... | priority: 0                                      |
  |   idempotency_key: create_sales_receipt:order:fb1293e0...                                        |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log                                                                               |
  |   sync_type: salesreceipt | action: create | status: success                                     |
  |   qb_entity_type: SalesReceipt | qb_doc_number: 260213-001                                       |
  |   amount_paisa: 176320 | http_status: 200 | duration_ms: ~450                                    |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  SalesReceipt  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/salesreceipt] -----------------+

  |   TotalAmt: 1763.20 PKR                                                                          |
  |   Tax: 243.20 PKR                                                                                |
  |   DepositTo: Cash Register                                                                       |

  |         -> Income: "Foodpanda Revenue" (default)                                                 |
  |     [2] Seekh Kabab (6 pcs) (Extra Spicy, Green Chutney)                                         |
  |         Qty 3 x 180.00 = 540.00 PKR                                                              |
  |         -> Income: "Foodpanda Revenue" (default)                                                 |

  |         -> Income: "Foodpanda Revenue" (default)                                                 |

  |     DR  Cash Register                                         1763.20                            |

                                SCENARIO 3: Voided Order  ->  QB CreditMemo                              
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Dine-In --------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-003 | Dine-In | Table: T-12 | Pay: Cash                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Mutton Biryani                     x1    @Rs.550.00     = Rs.550.00                         |
  |   2. Naan                               x2     @Rs.40.00      = Rs.80.00                         |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Subtotal:                                                     Rs.630.00                        |
  |   Tax (16%):                                                    Rs.100.80                        |
  |   TOTAL:                                                        Rs.730.80                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders/ea596192-0fc9-403f-ac7f-2bfcbb84e655/void                                    |
  |   -> Updates order status: completed -> voided                                                   |
  |   -> Logs status change: voided (reason: Wrong order delivered — voided by manager)              |
  |   -> Updates table T-12 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_credit_memo | priority: 0                                              |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v

  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_items (2 rows)                                                                      |
  |   1: Mutton Biryani                 | qty: 1 | price:  55000 | total:   55000                    |
  |   2: Naan                           | qty: 2 | price:   4000 | total:    8000                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: order_status_log                                                                          |
  |   status: voided | changed_by: cashier | timestamp: 2026-02-13T15:10:00+00:00                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_credit_memo | status: pending -> processing -> completed                      |

  |                                                                                                  |

                        SCENARIO 4: Partial Refund (Rs.500.00)  ->  QB RefundReceipt

  | POST /api/v1/orders/22da109b-1eb0-45ed-907f-3ad5a367d560/refund  (body: amount=50000)            |
  |   -> Validates: refund Rs.500.00 <= order total Rs.1825.60                                       |
  |   -> Creates refund record linked to order                                                       |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_refund_receipt | priority: 0                                           |

                                                    |
                                                    v

  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |

  | TOTALS                     4     Rs.6590.00   Rs.1054.40     Rs.7544.40                          |

  |   Cash                               Rs.1763.20                                                  |

  |   Foodpanda                          Rs.1693.60                                                  |

  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_log (2 entries)                                                                   |
  |   [1] sync_type: journal_entry | qb_doc_number: DAILY-2026-02-13 | status: success               |
  |   [2] sync_type: deposit | status: success                                                       |

=========================================================================================================
                                       TEMPLATE: resort_restaurant                                       
                                         Resort / Club Restaurant                                        
=========================================================================================================

  Resort or country club F&B. Pool bar, beach restaurant, room service. Package inclusions. International guests (multi-currency). Event venue.

  ACCOUNT MAPPINGS (23 total):
  Type           D Account Name                               QB Account Type                 
  -------------- - ------------------------------------------ --------------------------------
  INCOME         * Main Restaurant Revenue                    Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Beach / Pool Bar Revenue                   Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Room Service Revenue                       Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   All-Inclusive Package F&B                  Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Event & Wedding F&B Revenue                Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Spa Cafe Revenue                           Income/SalesOfProductIncome     
                   Foreign Currency Revenue                   Income/OtherPrimaryIncome       
  COGS           * Food Cost (All Outlets)                    Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Beverage & Bar Cost                        Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
                   Import & Premium Ingredient Cost           Cost of Goods Sold/SuppliesMaterialsCogs
  TAX            * VAT Payable (5%)                           Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
                   Tourism Dirham Payable                     Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  BANK           * Cash Register                              Bank/CashOnHand                 
                   Bank Account (Card Settlements)            Bank/Checking                   
                   Online Payment Settlement                  Bank/Checking                   
  DISCOUNT       * Discount Given                             Income/DiscountsRefundsGiven    
  ROUNDING       * Rounding Adjustment                        Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  CASH O/S       * Cash Over/Short                            Expense/OtherMiscellaneousExpense
  TIPS           * Tips Payable                               Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  GIFT CARD      * Gift Card Liability                        Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
  LIABILITY      * Customer Deposits                          Other Current Liability/OtherCurrentLiabilities
                   Guest Folio Receivable                     Other Current Asset/OtherCurrentAssets
  SVC CHARGE     * Service Charge Revenue                     Income/ServiceFeeIncome         

  VALIDATION:
    OK    All 7 required types present with defaults

                 SCENARIO 2: Completed Takeaway Order (with discount)  ->  QB SalesReceipt               
=========================================================================================================
  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Takeaway -------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | Order #260213-002 | Takeaway | Customer: Ahmed Khan | Pay: Credit Card                           |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   1. Chicken Karahi (Half)              x1   @Rs.1200.00    = Rs.1200.00  [Less oil]             |

                                SCENARIO 3: Voided Order  ->  QB CreditMemo

  |                                                                                                  |

  |   TOTAL:                                                        Rs.730.80                        |

                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/orders/ea596192-0fc9-403f-ac7f-2bfcbb84e655/void                                    |
  |   -> Updates order status: completed -> voided                                                   |
  |   -> Logs status change: voided (reason: Wrong order delivered — voided by manager)              |
  |   -> Updates table T-12 status: occupied -> available                                            |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_credit_memo | priority: 0                                              |

  |   2: Naan                           | qty: 2 | price:   4000 | total:    8000                    |

  |   -> Creates refund record linked to order                                                       |
  |                                                                                                  |

=========================================================================================================
                                   TEMPLATE: multi_franchise_pakistani                                   
                    Multi-Franchise Pakistani Restaurant (5 Branches, Central Kitchen)                   
=========================================================================================================

  Multi-franchise operation across Punjab cities. Per-branch revenue tracking via QB Classes. Central kitchen commissary. Inter-branch transfers. Franchise royalty (6%) and marketing fund (3%). Multi-province tax (FBR + PRA). Consolidated and per-branch P&L.

  ACCOUNT MAPPINGS (62 total):
  Type           D Account Name                               QB Account Type                 
  -------------- - ------------------------------------------ --------------------------------

=========================================================================================================
                   SCENARIO 4: Central Kitchen -> Gulberg Branch Transfer -> JournalEntry                
=========================================================================================================

  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Central Kitchen Transfer ---------------------------------------------------+
  | Transfer Type: Central Kitchen -> Branch                                                         |
  | From: Central Kitchen | To: Gulberg Branch                                                       |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | Items Transferred:                                                                               |
  |   1. Marinated Chicken (20 kg)          Rs.1,800.00                                              |
  |   2. Biryani Masala Mix (5 kg)           Rs.1,200.00                                             |
  |   3. Naan Dough (10 kg)                    Rs.500.00                                             |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | Total Transfer Value:                   Rs.3500.00                                               |
  | Approved by: Central Kitchen Manager                                                             |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/inventory/transfers                                                                 |
  |   -> Creates transfer record: Central Kitchen -> Gulberg                                         |
  |   -> Items: 3 line items, total value Rs.3500.00                                                 |
  |   -> Auto-adjusts inventory at both locations                                                    |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (auto-triggered)                                      |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_journal_entry (inter-branch transfer) | priority: 3                    |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: inventory_transfers                                                                       |
  |   from: Central Kitchen | to: Gulberg | status: completed                                        |
  |   total_value: 350000 paisa | items: 3 | approved_by: ck_manager                                 |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_journal_entry | entity_type: transfer | status: completed                     |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  JournalEntry  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/journalentry] -----------------+
  |   DocNumber: XFER-2026-02-13-GUL                                                                 |
  |   TxnDate: 2026-02-13                                                                            |
  |   Note: Inter-branch transfer: Central Kitchen -> Gulberg | Marinated chicken (20kg), Biryani masala (5kg), Naan dough (10kg) | Amount: 3500.00 PKR |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Line Items (2):                                                                                |
  |     [1]  Debit: 3500.00 PKR                                                                      |
  |         Account: "Inter-Branch Transfer Cost"                                                    |
  |         Memo: Stock transfer: Marinated chicken (20kg), Biryani masala (5kg), Naan dough (10kg) (Central Kitchen -> Gulberg) |
  |     [2] Credit: 3500.00 PKR                                                                      |
  |         Account: "Central Kitchen Revenue"                                                       |
  |         Memo: Central Kitchen supply to Gulberg                                                  |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

  Double-Entry Effect (Inter-Branch Transfer):
    DR  Inter-Branch Transfer Cost               3500.00  [Class: Branch-Gulberg]
    CR  Central Kitchen Revenue                  3500.00  [Class: Central-Kitchen]

  -> Receiving branch (Gulberg) incurs cost
  -> Central Kitchen recognizes internal revenue
  -> QB Classes enable separate P&L per entity

                  SCENARIO 5: Franchise Royalty (6%) + Marketing Fund (3%) -> JournalEntry               
=========================================================================================================

  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Franchise Royalty Calculation ----------------------------------------------+
  | Date: 2026-02-13 | Calculation Period: Daily                                                     |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | Branch                     Gross Revenue   Royalty 6%      Mktg 3%        Total                  |
  | ------------------------- -------------- ------------ ------------ ------------                  |
  | Gulberg                       Rs.1870.00    Rs.112.20     Rs.56.10    Rs.168.30                  |
  | DHA                           Rs.3280.00    Rs.196.80     Rs.98.40    Rs.295.20                  |
  | Johar Town                    Rs.1530.00     Rs.91.80     Rs.45.90    Rs.137.70                  |
  | Model Town                    Rs.2860.00    Rs.171.60     Rs.85.80    Rs.257.40                  |
  | Airport                       Rs.1300.00     Rs.78.00     Rs.39.00    Rs.117.00                  |
  | ------------------------- -------------- ------------ ------------ ------------                  |
  | TOTAL                        Rs.10840.00    Rs.650.40    Rs.325.20    Rs.975.60                  |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | Total Due to Franchisor: Rs.975.60                                                               |
  |   Royalty (6%): Rs.650.40 -> accrued to Royalty Payable                                          |
  |   Marketing (3%): Rs.325.20 -> accrued to Marketing Fund Payable                                 |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- BACKEND API ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | POST /api/v1/integrations/quickbooks/sync  (type: franchise_royalty)                             |
  |   -> Calculates royalty on 10840.00 PKR gross revenue                                            |
  |   -> Royalty 6%: 650.40 PKR                                                                      |
  |   -> Marketing 3%: 325.20 PKR                                                                    |
  |   -> Enqueues job: create_journal_entry (franchise_royalty) | priority: 5                        |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- DATABASE RECORDS -----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
  | TABLE: franchise_royalty_log                                                                     |
  |   period: 2026-02-13 | total_revenue: 1084000                                                    |
  |   royalty_pct: 6.0 | royalty_amount: 65040                                                       |
  |   marketing_pct: 3.0 | marketing_amount: 32520                                                   |
  |   status: accrued | payment_due: 2026-03-15                                                      |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | TABLE: qb_sync_queue                                                                             |
  |   job_type: create_journal_entry | entity_type: royalty | status: completed                      |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                                                    |
                                                    v
  +--- QUICKBOOKS ONLINE  --  JournalEntry  [POST /v3/company/{realm}/journalentry] -----------------+
  |   DocNumber: ROYAL-2026-02-13                                                                    |
  |   TxnDate: 2026-02-13                                                                            |
  |   Note: Franchise royalty & marketing fund for 2026-02-13: Royalty 6.0% = 650.40 PKR, Marketing 3.0% = 325.20 PKR, Total owed: 975.60 PKR |
  |                                                                                                  |
  |   Line Items (4):                                                                                |
  |     [1]  Debit: 650.40 PKR                                                                       |
  |         Account: "Royalty Fee Expense (6%)"                                                      |
  |         Memo: Franchise royalty 6.0% of 10840.00 PKR                                             |
  |     [2]  Debit: 325.20 PKR                                                                       |
  |         Account: "Marketing Fund (3%)"                                                           |
  |         Memo: Marketing fund 3.0% of 10840.00 PKR                                                |
  |     [3] Credit: 650.40 PKR                                                                       |
  |         Account: "Royalty Payable"                                                               |
  |         Memo: Royalty payable to franchisor                                                      |
  |     [4] Credit: 325.20 PKR                                                                       |
  |         Account: "Marketing Fund Payable"                                                        |
  |         Memo: Marketing fund payable to brand HQ                                                 |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

  Double-Entry Effect (Franchise Fees):
    DR  Royalty Fee Expense (6%)                   650.40
    DR  Marketing Fund (3%)                        325.20
    CR  Royalty Payable                            650.40
    CR  Marketing Fund Payable                     325.20

  Balance Check: DR 975.60 = CR 975.60 BALANCED

                SCENARIO 6: Consolidated Daily Close -> JournalEntry + Multi-Branch Deposit

  +--- POS TERMINAL  --  Consolidated End of Day Close ----------------------------------------------+

  | Model Town               1     Rs.2860.00    Rs.0.00    Rs.457.60     Rs.3317.60                 |
  | Airport                  1     Rs.1300.00    Rs.0.00    Rs.208.00     Rs.1508.00                 |

  | GRAND TOTAL              5    Rs.10840.00  Rs.200.00   Rs.1734.40    Rs.12374.40                 |

  |   Note: Consolidated multi-branch deposit for 2026-02-13                                         |

  |   Line Items (5):                                                                                |
  |     Gulberg Cash deposit - 2026-02-13: 2169.20 PKR                                               |
  |         From: "Gulberg Cash Register"                                                            |

  |         From: "Undeposited Funds"                                                                |
  |     Johar Town Foodpanda deposit - 2026-02-13: 1774.80 PKR                                       |
  |         From: "Foodpanda Settlement"                                                             |
  |     Model Town JazzCash deposit - 2026-02-13: 3317.60 PKR                                        |
  |         From: "JazzCash Settlement"                                                              |
  |     Airport Credit Card deposit - 2026-02-13: 1508.00 PKR                                        |
  |         From: "Undeposited Funds"                                                                |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

  CONSOLIDATED JOURNAL BALANCE CHECK:
    Total Debit:  Rs.12374.40
    Total Credit: Rs.12374.40
    Status: BALANCED

=========================================================================================================
                         SCENARIO 7: Per-Branch P&L via QB Classes (Reporting View)                      
=========================================================================================================

  This scenario demonstrates how QB Classes enable per-branch profit tracking.
  No new QB entity is created — this is a REPORTING capability.

  +--- QUICKBOOKS REPORT: Profit & Loss by Class ----------------------------------------------------+
  | Period: 2026-02-13 (Daily)                                                                       |
  |                                                                                                  |
  | Account                               Gulberg            DHA     Johar Town     Model Town        Airport          TOTAL |
  | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
  | Revenue                            Rs.1870.00     Rs.3080.00     Rs.1530.00     Rs.2860.00     Rs.1300.00    Rs.10640.00 |
  | Tax Collected                       Rs.299.20      Rs.524.80      Rs.244.80      Rs.457.60      Rs.208.00     Rs.1734.40 |
  | Gross Collection                   Rs.2169.20     Rs.3604.80     Rs.1774.80     Rs.3317.60     Rs.1508.00    Rs.12374.40 |
  | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
  | Less: Royalty (6%)                 -Rs.112.20     -Rs.196.80      -Rs.91.80     -Rs.171.60      -Rs.78.00     -Rs.650.40 |
  | Less: Marketing (3%)                -Rs.56.10      -Rs.98.40      -Rs.45.90      -Rs.85.80      -Rs.39.00     -Rs.325.20 |
  | Less: Platform Commission             Rs.0.00        Rs.0.00     -Rs.459.00        Rs.0.00        Rs.0.00     -Rs.459.00 |
  | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
  | NET BRANCH CONTRIBUTION            Rs.1701.70     Rs.2784.80      Rs.933.30     Rs.2602.60     Rs.1183.00     Rs.9205.40 |
  +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

  Key Insight: QB Classes allow the client to run this P&L report
  directly in QuickBooks Online, filtering by any branch or combination.
  No custom reporting needed — it's built into QB's standard reports.

  How to access in QuickBooks:
    Reports -> Profit and Loss -> Customize -> Rows/Columns -> Class
    This gives per-branch breakdown for any date range.
